message:
docs: create ultimate hybrid web platform plan (v3.0)

Completely rewrote and expanded the NTM web platform plan to incorporate
the best ideas from all competing LLM plans (Gemini, GPT, GPT Pro).

Key additions from synthesis:
- "North-Star Vision" and non-negotiable requirements (GPT Pro)
- "Ground Truth" section mapping actual code paths (GPT)
- Command Kernel concept for mechanical parity guarantee (GPT Pro)
- Parity Gate CI tests to enforce API/CLI parity (GPT Pro)
- Service Layer extraction pattern (GPT)
- "Decks" UI metaphor for flywheel components (Gemini)
- Galaxy View for dependency graph visualization (Gemini)
- tmux pipe-pane capture for real-time streaming (GPT Pro)
- Backpressure & replay/resume model with cursors (GPT Pro)
- Snapshot-on-connect pattern for "no blank pane" UX (GPT Pro)
- Agent Driver abstraction (tmux/ACP/SDK modes) (GPT Pro)
- Conflict Heatmap component (GPT Pro)
- UI performance budgets with explicit targets (GPT Pro)
- RBAC security model (viewer/operator/admin) (GPT Pro)
- Risk register with mitigations (GPT Pro)
- Complete testing strategy (GPT Pro)
- Exhaustive parity matrices for CLI and robot mode (GPT)

Document grown from ~2150 to ~2850 lines with 26 major sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
